data.current_summary: Get ticker data for all traded token pairs
data.current_description: Returns ticker information for all token pairs traded on the exchange. Each key is in the format ETH_{tokenCode}. This is the only REST endpoint; all other functionality uses WebSocket (socket.io).
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves real-time ticker data for all ERC-20 token pairs traded on the exchange. Response is a dictionary where each key represents a trading pair in the format ETH_{tokenCode} (e.g., ETH_REP), and each value contains a TickerEntry object with market statistics including last price, bid/ask spreads, volume, and trade history. This is the only available REST endpoint; all other exchange functionality (orders, trades, funds) requires WebSocket connections via socket.io. Note: EtherDelta is defunct as of 2018; ForkDelta (the successor) is archived as of December 2022.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks details about the response structure and data fields within each TickerEntry, which are critical for AI agents to understand what data is available and how to use it. This helps AI agents understand the operation's scope and limitations.
